Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 93 

HLTH_HOME_MH_CC_IND 

LABEL: Health Home Mental Health State-Reported Chronic Condition Indicator — Latest in Year 

DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate whether the beneficiary had the health home Chronic Condition “mental health”; 
most recent in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: HLTH_HOME_MH_CC_IND 

LONG NAME: HLTH_HOME_MH_CC_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S):
